meta.title: HLX Unified Codex
meta.purpose: Didactic injection of the HLX Language Family into LLM context. This file is the single source of truth for bootstrapping HLX capability.

1_axioms.description: The inviolable truths governing the Helix architecture.

axioms.name: DETERMINISM
axioms.rule: The same input code must ALWAYS produce the same Latent Collapse (LC) stream.

axioms.name: REVERSIBILITY
axioms.rule: Any value compressed into a Handle (⚳) can be resolved (⚯) back to its exact original state.

axioms.name: BIJECTION
axioms.rule: Track A (Lite/ASCII) and Track B (Runic/Glyph) are mathematically isomorphic. They map 1:1.

axioms.name: UNIVERSAL_VALUE
axioms.rule: All tracks lower to the HLX-Lite Value System (Contracts 1-5) before encoding.

2_architecture.description: The Dual-Track Architecture. Two surface languages, one runtime.

track_a_lite.name: HLX-Lite (Engineering)
track_a_lite.pipeline: HLXL (Source) -> HLXL-LS (Latent Ops) -> HLX-Lite Value -> LC Stream

track_b_runic.name: HLX-Runic (Native)
track_b_runic.pipeline: HLX (Source) -> HLX-LS (Latent Ops) -> HLX-Lite Value -> LC Stream

3_foundation_values.description: The atomic type system underlying all HLX languages. It defines HOW data is structured.

4_transliteration.description: Mandatory ASCII transliteration table for all canonical glyphs.

5_latent_collapse.name: LC (Latent Collapse)
5_latent_collapse.description: The universal wire format. Defined in two modes as per SD9.

lc_t_text.description: Human-readable projection for LLMs and debugging.

lc_b_binary.description: Authoritative binary form for hashing and storage (v2).
lc_b_binary.object_rule: Fields encoded as <field_idx_leb128><VALUE>. Must be sorted by index.
